products_title: Treatment Plans — Chosen Based on Your Free Diagnosis
products_meta_desc: Discover the custom treatment plan for your condition. No ready-made product — every program is designed after a confidential consultation with Dr. Sarah. Cash on Delivery · 90-Day Guarantee.
products_hero_subtitle: There is no 'ready-made product' here. After your free consultation with Dr. Sarah, a plan customized for your condition only is designed. Cash on Delivery · 90-Day Guarantee · Total Privacy.
products_subtitle: جميع الخطط تشمل: استشارة سرية + متابعة شخصية مع د. سارة + الدفع عند الاستلام + ضمان 90 يوم.
products_basic_note: For mild cases or first-time users
products_advanced_note: For chronic issues + desire for strong and fast improvement
products_premium_f2: ✓ Unlimited personal consultations with Dr. Sarah
products_premium_note: For those who want a complete and permanent solution for all three issues together
products_guarantee_text: If you don't notice a real difference, contact us and we will refund your full amount — no questions and no conditions. Trust in Dr. Sarah's program is complete because the results are documented.
products_shipping_p1_text: The box contains no brand names or content descriptions. Even the delivery person doesn't know what's inside.
products_shipping_p2_text: The invoice and accompanying papers are under a generic trade company name (such as 'Dietary Supplements') — no mention of men's health or the clinic.
products_shipping_p3_text: You pay cash to the delivery person upon receiving the order. No credit card or bank transfer needed. Inspect the order in front of the delivery person, then pay.
products_final_title: Start Your Free Diagnosis — Then Choose Your Plan
products_final_subtitle: Don't choose blindly. Let Dr. Sarah diagnose your condition first, then recommend the right plan.
